hooks.prompt: Check: 1) Has .claude/features.json been updated with current progress? 2) Has .claude/progress.md been updated? 3) Was the last completed feature committed to git? If any are missing, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "describe what's missing"}.

hooks.command: echo 'CONTEXT REMINDER: Read /Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/.taskstate/features-v2.json for v2 feature status (38 features). Read /Users/macbook/Workspace/Devotts/taskclaw/.taskstate/progress-v2.md for current state and rules. PRDs: taskclaw-docs/implementations/memory-layer/prd-pluggable-memory-layer.md and taskclaw-docs/implementations/unified-architecture/prd-unified-architecture.md. Work DB first, then BE, then FE, then INT. Commit after each feature: git commit -m "feat(v2): [name] [ID]". Memory writes ALWAYS fire-and-forget. 200ms timeout on recall. Run up to 10 browser test scenarios per feature using Playwright MCP.'
